task_description: Phase 19: Real Realtime Media - Replace fake SFU with LiveKit gateway, add WebRTC frontend components, implement QuantChat calls, QuantMax random video chat matchmaking, TURN server infrastructure, and E2E encryption support.

verification.summary: pnpm typecheck 80/80 tasks pass, pnpm test 82/82 tasks pass. Review fixes applied: partner token leak fixed, leaveCall added, TURN RBAC scoped, images pinned, TTL documented.

review_fixes_applied: Partner token leak: removed partnerToken from /random-chat/join response, added GET /:pairId/token endpoint
CallService leave vs end: added leaveCall(callId, userId) method, route /calls/:id/leave uses it instead of endCall
TURN CronJob RBAC: added resourceNames to limit secrets and deployments access
Coturn image pinned to 4.6.2, kubectl image pinned to 1.28
Token TTL documentation added to generateToken in livekit-gateway, call.service, and matchmaker
